title: Senior Revenue Manager at India Tourism Development Corporation

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at India Tourism Development Corporation
jsonLd.description:
India Tourism Development Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Tourism Development Corporation:
India Tourism Development Corporation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Tourism Development Corporation!
